highlights.label: Hemoglobin
highlights.note: Above upper limit 16.1 — polycythemia or hemoconcentration. Persistent across both Feb 2026 draws.

highlights.label: Basophilia
highlights.note: Persistently elevated — present Feb 2023, Feb 12 and Feb 16, 2026. Three occurrences across 3 years.

highlights.label: HDL Cholesterol
highlights.note: LOW — significantly below 40 threshold. Elevated cardiovascular risk.

highlights.label: Triglycerides
highlights.note: Slightly above normal threshold — associated with hepatic fat accumulation.

highlights.label: Creatinine / GFR
highlights.note: Trending up 1.04→1.12 over 4 days. GFR dropped 89→81. Mild kidney stress pattern.
